id="routeA" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1a1c1e;strokeColor=#83d8a6;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=17;fontFamily=Noto Sans <mxGeometry height="205" width="270" x="960" y="565" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="routeB" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#2f855a;strokeColor=#83d8a6;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=17;fontFamily=Noto Sans <mxGeometry height="175" width="350" x="1060" y="835" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step5" parent="1" div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 69px; margin-left: 64px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #f3fff7;
display: inline-block; font-size: 34px; font-family: 'Noto Sans JP'; color: light-dark(#f3fff7, #0d1710); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 新規建物アセットの作成フロー

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 110px; margin-left: 66px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #c4d2cb;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: 'Noto Sans JP'; color: light-dark(#c4d2cb, #333f39); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: Timberborn の新しい配置物を作るときの標準ルート。Route A/B は「新規建物アセット」トラックの中で分岐する。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(26, 28, 30), rgb(212, 214, 216)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(63, 73, 66), rgb(170, 179, 173));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 254px; height: 1px; padding-top: 258px; margin-left: 86px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #edf7f0;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: 'Noto Sans JP'; color: light-dark(#edf7f0, #151d17); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
SCOPE
この図の対象
新規建物アセット向け。
既存値だけの変更なら
Empty + JSON content mod が先。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(26, 28, 30), rgb(212, 214, 216)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(63, 73, 66), rgb(170, 179, 173));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 254px; height: 1px; padding-top: 485px; margin-left: 86px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #edf7f0;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: 'Noto Sans JP'; color: light-dark(#edf7f0, #151d17); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
INPUTS
先に決めること
・建物名 / faction / category
・footprint と完成後の役割
・元の texture を保つか
・Built-in material で寄せるか

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(26, 28, 30), rgb(212, 214, 216)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(63, 73, 66), rgb(170, 179, 173));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 254px; height: 1px; padding-top: 780px; margin-left: 86px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #edf7f0;
display: inline-block; font-size: 17px; font-family: 'Noto Sans JP'; color: light-dark(#edf7f0, #151d17); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
GUARDRAILS
失敗しにくい前提
・土台は Example building
・最初は完成モデル 1 個だけ
・Route B では .mat と .png の basename を分ける
・material / bundle 更新後は完全再起動
・値が Blueprint に出ないなら C# / BepInEx を検討

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 204px; height: 1px; padding-top: 255px; margin-left: 440px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #0f1712;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: 'Noto Sans JP'; color: light-dark(#0f1712, #d6ddd8); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
START
新規建物アセットを作りたい
配置可能な建物として追加する

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(26, 28, 30), rgb(212, 214, 216)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(63, 73, 66), rgb(170, 179, 173));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 214px; height: 1px; padding-top: 247px; margin-left: 730px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #edf7f0;
display: inline-block; font-size: 17px; font-family: 'Noto Sans JP'; color: light-dark(#edf7f0, #151d17); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
STEP 1
Example building で土台を作る
Blueprint / icon / localization / 登録例を確保

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(26, 28, 30), rgb(212, 214, 216)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(63, 73, 66), rgb(170, 179, 173));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 224px; height: 1px; padding-top: 247px; margin-left: 1040px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #edf7f0;
display: inline-block; font-size: 17px; font-family: 'Noto Sans JP'; color: light-dark(#edf7f0, #151d17); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
STEP 2
名前と仕様を固定する
建物 ID / faction / footprint / ToolGroup / cost

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(26, 28, 30), rgb(212, 214, 216)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(63, 73, 66), rgb(170, 179, 173));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 244px; height: 1px; padding-top: 247px; margin-left: 1350px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #edf7f0;
display: inline-block; font-size: 17px; font-family: 'Noto Sans JP'; color: light-dark(#edf7f0, #151d17); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
STEP 3
Blender でモデルを整える
原点 / 向き / スケール / UV / Collection

div.b:
元の texture を
保ちたい？

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(26, 28, 30), rgb(212, 214, 216)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(131, 216, 166), rgb(15, 88, 45));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 234px; height: 1px; padding-top: 678px; margin-left: 990px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #edf7f0;
display: inline-block; font-size: 17px; font-family: 'Noto Sans JP'; color: light-dark(#edf7f0, #151d17); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
ROUTE A
Built-in material で進める
・Blender CLI で .timbermesh export
・Unity は使わない
・Timberborn 風に寄せる

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(47, 133, 90), rgb(86, 160, 123)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(131, 216, 166), rgb(15, 88, 45));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 284px; height: 1px; padding-top: 665px; margin-left: 1315px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #f4fff8;
display: inline-block; font-size: 17px; font-family: 'Noto Sans JP'; color: light-dark(#f4fff8, #0e1711); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
ROUTE B
Texture を保持して進める
・.timbermesh + texture export
・Unity で Material 作成
・AssetBundle と MaterialCollection を追加

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(26, 28, 30), rgb(212, 214, 216)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(63, 73, 66), rgb(170, 179, 173));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 314px; height: 1px; padding-top: 933px; margin-left: 1090px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #edf7f0;
display: inline-block; font-size: 17px; font-family: 'Noto Sans JP'; color: light-dark(#edf7f0, #151d17); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
STEP 4
ゲーム側の配線を更新
Blueprint / TemplateCollection / icon / localization
Route B は MaterialCollection も追加

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(26, 28, 30), rgb(212, 214, 216)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(63, 73, 66), rgb(170, 179, 173));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 314px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1123px; margin-left: 1090px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #edf7f0;
display: inline-block; font-size: 17px; font-family: 'Noto Sans JP'; color: light-dark(#edf7f0, #151d17); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
STEP 5
built mod を配置 / build する
Route B は bundle 出力を同梱

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(51, 53, 55), rgb(191, 192, 194)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(131, 216, 166), rgb(15, 88, 45));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 188px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1120px; margin-left: 1451px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #f3fff7;

display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: 'Noto Sans JP'; color: light-dark(#f3fff7, #0d1710); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.b:
配置 preview / material /
コストは正常？

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(26, 28, 30), rgb(212, 214, 216)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(63, 73, 66), rgb(170, 179, 173));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 264px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1128px; margin-left: 730px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #edf7f0;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: 'Noto Sans JP'; color: light-dark(#edf7f0, #151d17); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
RECHECK
ログと配線を再確認
MaterialCollection / path / basename / Route 判定 / Blueprint 参照を見直す

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 74px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1125px; margin-left: 1700px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #0f1712;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: 'Noto Sans JP'; color: light-dark(#0f1712, #d6ddd8); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
DONE
配置成功
見た目と挙動をゲーム内確認
